'''naduthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yaje|yaje]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yaje|yaje]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| naduthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædithith|nædithith]] || [[word:nædithij|nædithij]] || [[word:nædithish|nædithish]] || [[word:nædithi|nædithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:naduduthuth|naduduthuth]] || [[word:naduduthuj|naduduthuj]] || [[word:naduduthush|naduduthush]] || [[word:naduduthu|naduduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:naduthuth|naduthuth]] || [[word:naduthuj|naduthuj]] || [[word:naduthush|naduthush]] || [[word:naduthu|naduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadufthuth|nadufthuth]] || [[word:nadufthuj|nadufthuj]] || [[word:nadufthush|nadufthush]] || [[word:nadufthuf|nadufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:naduthuthu|naduthuthu]] || [[word:naduthuju|naduthuju]] || [[word:naduthushu|naduthushu]] || [[word:naduthuku|naduthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:naduthuth|naduthuth]] || [[word:naduthuj|naduthuj]] || [[word:naduthush|naduthush]] || [[word:naduthu|naduthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:naduthuthul|naduthuthul]] || [[word:naduthujul|naduthujul]] || [[word:naduthushul|naduthushul]] || [[word:naduthukul|naduthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:naduthuthuthu|naduthuthuthu]] || [[word:naduthujuju|naduthujuju]] || [[word:naduthushushu|naduthushushu]] || [[word:naduthuku|naduthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:naduthuthun|naduthuthun]] || [[word:naduthujun|naduthujun]] || [[word:naduthushun|naduthushun]] || [[word:naduthukun|naduthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:naduthuthuoro|naduthuthuoro]] || [[word:naduthujuoro|naduthujuoro]] || [[word:naduthushuoro|naduthushuoro]] || [[word:naduthukuoro|naduthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
